hooks.command: FILE=$(echo '$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *.kt ]]; then cd /Users/PARK/Desktop/cs-wiki2/ata-platform && ./gradlew ktlintFormat -q 2>/dev/null || true; fi
echo '[ATA] Claude 세션 종료. 변경사항 확인: git status' >> /tmp/ata-claude.log
